content.json:
# Network Availability — VPN / ExpressRoute Gateway Health
**Theme:** Network availability · **Data source:** `AzureDiagnostics` (gateway diagnostic logs) + `AzureMetrics`.

Tunnel up/down state, gateway throughput, IKE renegotiations, and bandwidth utilization.

> Requires diagnostic settings on the VPN/ER gateway (TunnelDiagnosticLog, IKEDiagnosticLog) and platform metrics.

content.query: AzureDiagnostics | where ResourceType == 'VIRTUALNETWORKGATEWAYS' and Category == 'TunnelDiagnosticLog' | summarize Events=count(), LastEvent=max(TimeGenerated) by Resource, status_s, remoteIP_s | sort by Events desc
content.title: Tunnel connect/disconnect events

content.query: AzureMetrics | where ResourceProvider == 'MICROSOFT.NETWORK' and MetricName in ('TunnelEgressBytes', 'TunnelIngressBytes') | summarize Bytes=sum(Total) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), MetricName | render timechart
content.title: Gateway tunnel bytes in/out

content.query: AzureDiagnostics | where ResourceType == 'VIRTUALNETWORKGATEWAYS' and Category == 'IKEDiagnosticLog' | summarize Count=count() by Resource, Message | top 100 by Count desc
content.title: IKE / renegotiation diagnostics

content.query: AzureMetrics | where ResourceProvider == 'MICROSOFT.NETWORK' and MetricName == 'AverageBandwidth' | summarize AvgBps=avg(Average) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), Resource | render timechart
content.title: Gateway average bandwidth utilization
